name: Platinum Kryptonite/ Gives you the powers of Superman
description:
An interactive sci-fi scenario set in the frozen wastelands of Antarctica.

You are an explorer searching for Superman’s lost fortress when you uncover a fragment of Platinum Kryptonite — a mysterious crystal capable of granting Kryptonian power to humans.

Every choice you make shapes how your body and mind adapt to the impossible energy now flowing through you. Test your strength, analyze the crystal, explore the ruins... or lose yourself to the power within.

This is not a story about finding the fortress. It’s a story about what happens when humanity touches godhood.
creator: Samuel68
